## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Mention risks, trade-offs, follow-up work, or anything that deserves special attention. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] This pull request is focused on one topic.
- [ ] I have explained what changed and why.
- [ ] I have updated documentation if behavior, configuration, or public usage changed.
- [ ] I have avoided unrelated formatting or dependency churn.
- [ ] I have reviewed and verified any AI-assisted output included in this change.
- [ ] I have read and followed the Code of Conduct.
